title: [Novaterra] Chestplate Elytra + Armor Trim
description:
Novaterra Project:
Elytra Chestplate + Armor Trim
body:
> Ever since the teaser picture for 1.9 the yearning for elytra chestplates has been unsatiated.. UNTIL NOW!
> 
> I've created a Data/Resource Pack that will allow the combination of the two while also making the armor and elytra visible. Just place your choice of Chestplate and Elytra into a smithing table. 
> 
> On top of that, I've added support for all armor trims to be apparent and visible on each 'Chestplate Elytra.' Any smithing order will end in the same result. [(chestplate->elytra->trim) ,(trimmed chestplate->elytra)] 
> 
> This is my first Datapack that I've publicly uploaded but this is part of a greater overhaul called Novaterra. Please be on the lookout for more content and I hope you enjoy <3
> 
> [Resource Pack is required]
> [ONLY WORKS ON 1.21+ SNAPSHOTS 24w36a+]
